task_completion.description: Verify that the 'air.mon.ltm.nc' dataset is loaded into Panoply.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Panoply application window should be open with 'air.mon.ltm.nc' visible in the Datasets or Sources panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 1D Time-Series Line plot is created for the air temperature variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Panoply plot window should be visible displaying a 1D line graph with months on the x-axis and temperature on the y-axis.

task_completion.description: Verify that the plot is configured for the correct geographical coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Panoply plot window (e.g., Array tab or plot title/subtitle), the coordinates should be set to Latitude 45.0 N and Longitude 285.0 E (which is 75 W in the 0-360 system).

task_completion.description: Verify that the plot is exported to the correct directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or Panoply save dialog showing 'st_lawrence_temp_series.png' located in the '~/Documents/Seaway/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the shipping season report is created and contains the correct climatological assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing 'shipping_season_report.txt' in '~/Documents/Seaway/'. If the contents are visible, it must identify January as the coldest month and list December, January, February, and March as the sub-freezing months.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Panoply GUI to generate the plot.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Panoply graphical interface being used to configure and view the plot, rather than terminal scripts generating the image.

integrity.description: Ensure the exported plot is genuinely from Panoply.
integrity.visual_evidence: The plot (if visible) should have the distinct visual style, fonts, and layout of a Panoply-generated chart, not a default matplotlib or seaborn plot.

integrity.description: Ensure the text report was created manually or via standard text editing tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen using a text editor (like nano, gedit, or VS Code) or shell redirection to write the report, rather than running a pre-made python script that bypasses the manual analysis.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target coordinates are Latitude 45°N and Longitude 285°E (75°W in the 0-360° system). Based on the dataset, the correct coldest month is January (-9.66°C) and the sub-freezing months are December, January, February, and March.
